subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 07 (Tablet to the seventh Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sendeth down whatsoever He willeth through His command "Be, and it is!" He it is Who holdeth within His grasp all who dwell in the heavens and on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الاقدر الاعززالعزیز. سبحان الذی ینزل ما یشاء بامره کن فیکون هو الذی بیده من فی السموات و الأرض
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
